mapper.select: select social_account_id, user_id, provider, provider_user_id, provider_email, is_active, connected_at, disconnected_at from social_accounts where user_id = #{userId} order by social_account_id desc
select social_account_id, user_id, provider, provider_user_id, provider_email, is_active, connected_at, disconnected_at from social_accounts order by social_account_id desc
mapper.insert: insert into social_accounts (user_id, provider, provider_user_id, provider_email, is_active, connected_at) values (#{userId}, #{provider}, #{providerUserId}, #{providerEmail}, #{isActive}, NOW())
